{"verdict":"approve","summary":"The declarations are at the natural level for this stage: `Deck p` avoids unnecessary covering-map, continuity, or topology-on-base assumptions, while the homeomorphism action instances are exactly as general as the acting type permits.","findings":[]}

verdict_obj.summary: The declarations are at the natural level for this stage: `Deck p` avoids unnecessary covering-map, continuity, or topology-on-base assumptions, while the homeomorphism action instances are exactly as general as the acting type permits.
